name: construction contractors processing 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 projects/month, delays in obtaining regulatory permits cause project delays. We automate permit submissions instead of manual submission of permit documents.
problem_solved: Delays in obtaining regulatory permits for construction projects.
